description: You are a Solar Energy Systems Engineer designing an off-grid solar microgrid for a clinic in Nairobi, Kenya. Energy3D is open. Open the file `~/Documents/Energy3D/solar-panel-tilt-angle.ng3`. Change the project's geographic location to Nairobi, Kenya (Latitude ~1° S). Select all solar panels in the scene and change their tilt angle to 5°. Run the Annual Yield Analysis for the solar panels to calculate the monthly energy production. Export the analysis results as a CSV file named `nairobi_yield.csv` in the `~/Documents/Energy3D/` directory. Finally, save the modified project as `nairobi_microgrid.ng3` in the same directory.
